backend/main.mo: Main actor for the backend, combining blob storage and authorization mixins to expose CRUD operations for products, orders, custom order requests, return requests, wishlists, and user profiles with role-based access control.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old Order schema (nested customerInfo, subtotal/shippingAmount/total fields) into the new flat Order schema with individual address fields and a single totalPrice field.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three checkout/order-related feature IDs to their implementing files (CheckoutPage.tsx, useQueries.ts, AdminOrdersManagement.tsx) with associated test IDs and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing component responsibilities, UI details, and notable implementation choices.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens (background, foreground, primary, etc.) in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, loading the Nunito 700 Google Font and mounting the app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (home, products, cart, checkout, admin, etc.), wraps the layout in CartProvider, and shows a 2.2-second loading screen on initial load.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminCusto: Admin component that fetches and displays custom order requests in a grid, showing details like product type, size, color, budget, and inspiration image. Handles loading and error states with skeletons and messages.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminOrder: Admin component for viewing and managing store orders, with a detail modal showing customer info, shipping address, and order items, plus a status update dropdown. Supports filtering and color-coded order statuses.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminProdu: Admin CRUD interface for managing products, with a dialog form for creating and editing products including image upload with progress tracking. Supports delete via alert dialog and displays products in a list with badges.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminRetur: Admin component that lists return requests with customer details, reason badges, optional message, and a condition video player with download support. Handles loading and error states with skeletons.
Slide-in cart drawer showing cart items, total price, and buttons to proceed to checkout or view the full cart page. Locks body scroll when open and closes on backdrop click.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartItem.ts: Renders a single cart item row with product image, title, price, quantity selector, total price, and a remove button using cart context actions.
frontend/src/components/checkout/OrderSu: Displays a checkout order summary panel listing cart items with quantities, subtotal, shipping cost (with free shipping logic), and grand total.
frontend/src/components/home/AboutSectio: A full-width 'Our Story' section with a parallax background image, dark overlay, and fade-in text animation triggered by an intersection observer.
frontend/src/components/home/BestSellers: Fetches and displays a grid of best-selling products using a query hook, with loading skeletons, error/empty states, and a 'View All Products' navigation button.
frontend/src/components/home/CTABanner.t: A call-to-action banner section with a headline and a link to the products page, animated into view via an intersection observer.
frontend/src/components/home/FloatingYar: Renders a canvas-based animation of softly drifting radial gradient orbs to create a subtle floating yarn visual effect on the hero section.
frontend/src/components/home/HeroSection: Full-screen hero section with a parallax background, floating yarn canvas animation, fade-in brand text, and a 'Shop Now' CTA link with a scroll indicator.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Site footer with brand description, social media links (Instagram, Pinterest, email), and a navigation grid; truncated content suggests additional columns and a copyright row.
frontend/src/components/layout/MusicTogg: A play/pause button that lazily loads background audio and fades volume in/out over a configurable duration using setInterval.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navbar.ts: Responsive fixed navbar with scroll-aware styling, desktop/mobile navigation links, and a cart icon with item count badge.
frontend/src/components/layout/Newslette: Email newsletter signup form with basic validation that shows a toast notification on successful submission.
frontend/src/components/LoadingScreen.ts: Full-screen loading overlay displaying an animated yarn-ball SVG, the brand name 'knotankey', and a bouncing dots indicator while the app initializes.
frontend/src/components/product-detail/Q: Numeric quantity selector component with increment/decrement buttons and configurable min/max bounds.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Displays a single product card with image, title, category, price, and buttons for quick-add to cart and view product detail. Uses CartContext to add items and shows a toast notification on add.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: React context providing cart state (add, update, remove, clear) with localStorage persistence and derived itemCount/total values.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY AuthClient, exposing identity, login/clear functions, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useIntersectionObserv: Hook that uses IntersectionObserver to return a boolean indicating whether a referenced element has entered the viewport.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductFilters.ts: Hook that memoizes filtering and sorting of a product list based on category, price range, bestseller flag, and sort order.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for CRUD operations on products, orders, custom order requests, and return requests via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts (Playfair Display, DM Sans), sets up Tailwind, defines a soft luxury beige/cream CSS variable palette for light and dark modes, and declares keyframe animations (fadeUp, float, spin-slow, etc.).
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with TanStack QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Password-protected admin dashboard page that gates access with a hardcoded passcode and renders tabbed management panels for products, orders, custom orders, and return requests.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page that displays cart items and an order summary with per-item pricing, total, and a button to proceed to checkout; shows an empty-state prompt when the cart is empty.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Checkout page with a shipping information form that collects customer details, calculates shipping, constructs an Order object, submits it via the useCreateOrder mutation, and redirects to a thank-you page on success.
frontend/src/pages/CustomOrderPage.tsx: Custom order request page with a form for product type, color, size, budget, description, and optional inspiration image upload; submits the request as a CustomOrderRequest with binary image data via the useCreateCustomOrder mutation.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page component that composes the HeroSection, BestSellersSection, AboutSection, and CTABanner sections in sequence.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Displays a single product's details (image, price, description, ratings) fetched by ID, with quantity controls and add-to-cart/buy-now actions.
frontend/src/pages/ProductsPage.tsx: Lists all products with search, category filter, and price range filter; derives categories dynamically from fetched data and renders filtered results via ProductCard.
frontend/src/pages/ReturnsPage.tsx: Provides a return request form with order details, reason selection, and optional unboxing video upload (max 50MB), along with policy information cards.
frontend/src/pages/ThankYouPage.tsx: Order confirmation page shown after checkout, displaying the order ID, a secure payment-via-email notice, and next-steps information with links back to home and products.
frontend/src/utils/currency.ts: Exports a formatINR helper that formats a number as Indian Rupees using Intl.NumberFormat with Indian comma notation and no decimal places.
frontend/src/utils/shipping.ts: Exports calculateShipping which returns ₹80 shipping for orders below ₹2999 and free shipping otherwise, along with the threshold and cost constants.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, using sessionStorage for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Yarn Boutique frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Playfair Display, DM Sans), oklch-based color tokens (brand cream/warm palette, sidebar, chart colors), custom shadows, border radii, transition utilities, and animation keyframes. Includes typography, container-queries, and tailwindcss-animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for the Yarn Boutique e-commerce app, recording existing implemented features and pending feature requests around capturing full order data at checkout and displaying all order fields in the Admin Orders management page.
